def b3_f002 {α : Type} : List α → Nat
| [] => 0
| _ :: xs => b3_f002 xs + 1

def b3_g002 {α : Type} : List α → Nat → Nat
| [], acc => acc
| _ :: xs, acc => b3_g002 xs (1 + acc)

theorem theorem_b3_p002 {α : Type} (xs : List α) (acc : Nat) :
    b3_g002 xs acc = acc + b3_f002 xs

def b3_f003 : List Nat → Nat
| [] => 0
| x :: xs => x + b3_f003 xs

def b3_g003 : List Nat → Nat → Nat
| [], acc => acc
| x :: xs, acc => b3_g003 xs (acc + x)

theorem theorem_b3_p003 (xs : List Nat) (acc : Nat) :
    b3_g003 xs acc = acc + b3_f003 xs

def b3_f004 {α : Type} : List α → Nat
| [] => 0
| _ :: xs => b3_f004 xs + 1

theorem theorem_b3_p004 {α : Type} (xs ys : List α) :
    b3_f004 (xs ++ ys) = b3_f004 xs + b3_f004 ys

def b3_f006 {α : Type} (p : α → Bool) : List α → Bool
| [] => true
| x :: xs => p x && b3_f006 p xs

theorem theorem_b3_p006 {α : Type} (p : α → Bool) (xs ys : List α) :
    b3_f006 p (xs ++ ys) = (b3_f006 p xs && b3_f006 p ys)

def b3_f008 {α : Type} (z : α) : List α → Prop
| [] => False
| x :: xs => x = z ∨ b3_f008 z xs

theorem theorem_b3_p008 {α : Type} (z : α) (xs ys : List α) :
    b3_f008 z xs → b3_f008 z (xs ++ ys)

inductive B3T010 (α : Type) where
| leaf : B3T010 α
| node : B3T010 α → α → B3T010 α → B3T010 α

def b3_f010 {α : Type} : B3T010 α → Nat
| .leaf => 0
| .node l _ r => b3_f010 l + b3_f010 r + 1

def b3_g010 {α β : Type} (h : α → β) : B3T010 α → B3T010 β
| .leaf => .leaf
| .node l x r => .node (b3_g010 h l) (h x) (b3_g010 h r)

theorem theorem_b3_p010 {α β : Type} (h : α → β) (t : B3T010 α) :
    b3_f010 (b3_g010 h t) = b3_f010 t

inductive B3T012 (α : Type) where
| leaf : B3T012 α
| node : B3T012 α → α → B3T012 α → B3T012 α

def b3_f012 {α : Type} : B3T012 α → B3T012 α
| .leaf => .leaf
| .node l x r => .node (b3_f012 r) x (b3_f012 l)

theorem theorem_b3_p012 {α : Type} (t : B3T012 α) :
    b3_f012 (b3_f012 t) = t

inductive B3T014 (α : Type) where
| leaf : B3T014 α
| node : B3T014 α → α → B3T014 α → B3T014 α

def b3_f014 {α β : Type} (h : α → β) : B3T014 α → B3T014 β
| .leaf => .leaf
| .node l x r => .node (b3_f014 h l) (h x) (b3_f014 h r)

theorem theorem_b3_p014 {α β γ : Type} (f : α → β) (g : β → γ) (t : B3T014 α) :
    b3_f014 g (b3_f014 f t) = b3_f014 (fun x => g (f x)) t

def b3_f016 : Nat → Nat → Nat
| 0, m => m
| n + 1, m => b3_f016 n m + 1

theorem theorem_b3_p016 (n m : Nat) :
    b3_f016 n m = n + m

theorem theorem_b3_p018 {α β : Type} (r : α → β → Prop) (f : β → β) :
    (∃ x : α, ∀ y : β, r x (f y)) → ∀ y : β, ∃ x : α, r x (f y)

theorem theorem_b3_p020 {α : Type} (fallback : α) (o : Option α) :
    (match o with | none => fallback | some x => x) = fallback ∨ ∃ x, o = some x
